name: Baby Bean Burritos
recipeIngredient: 1 fresh jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F. Stack the tortillas and cut each in half. Wrap the tortilla halves in foil and heat until warmed through, about 10 to 15 minutes.
2. In a large frying pan, cook onion in oil over medium-high heat until softened but not browned, about 2 to 3 minutes. Add garlic and jalapeno pepper, and cook until garlic is fragrant, about 30 seconds.
3. Spread about 1-1/2 tablespoons of bean mixture on each tortilla half. Roll up the tortillas in a jelly-roll fashion and arrange on a serving plate. Sprinkle with cilantro. Serve warm with sour cream and salsa.
COMMENTS: If you love spicy foods, these burritos will be irresistible. They're also messy to eat, so provide plenty of napkins.
